subcodes.title: Khutba on gematria and its sister (‘ilmi’l-Huruf va Ukhtiha)
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath enabled the gnosis of His Essence to be realized through His verses which express theophanic self-disclosure within the grandeur of the inmost heart
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم. الحمد لله الذی قد عرف ذاته بایاته المتجلیه فی غرا لفواد بغیر تشبیه و لا تفریق لیشهد الکل فی مقعد الفضل
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @alchemy; the elixir, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture
